headline: Electro Switch Announces David Schmidt as President of the Aerospace & Defense Businesses
summary: WEYMOUTH, Mass., July 06, 2026--Electro Switch Corp. ("Electro Switch" or the "Company"), a leading manufacturer of engineered switches and related components for critical applications in the power, utility, data center, aerospace & defense, and industrial markets, announced today that its Board of Directors has appointed David Schmidt as President of the Aerospace & Defense businesses.
